tooltip.guns.sniper_rifle.zoom: Right-click cycles 1/2/4/8/16x scope zoom; left-click fires while scoped
tooltip.guns.grenade_launcher.explosion: Fires arcing grenades that explode on first impact
tooltip.guns.smg: Short-range high-rate automatic weapon for close fights
tooltip.guns.flamethrower: Short-range continuous flame stream that ignites targets
tooltip.guns.railgun: Long-cooldown high-damage beam that pierces targets
